e: They amplify the magnetic field significantly. / ye chumbakiya kshetra ko kaafi badha dete hain.

q:
What is the value of '$\mu_0$' (Permeability of free space)?
'$\mu_0$' ka maan kya hai?
o: $4\pi 	imes 10^{-7} T \cdot m/A$ | $4\pi 	imes 10^{-7} T \cdot m/A$
e: Universal magnetic constant. / sarvabhumik chumbakiya niyatank.

q:
What is 'Intensity of Magnetization' unit?
'chumbakan ki teevrata' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Magnetic moment per unit volume. / prati ikai aaytan chumbakiya aghurn.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' unit Henry in terms of 'Volt, Second, Ampere'?
'Volt, Second, Ampere' ke sandarbh mein 'Henry' kya hai?
e: Derived from $e = L(dI/dt)$. / $e = L(dI/dt)$ se vyutpann.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Potential' unit?
'chumbakiya vibhav' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Analogous to electric potential. / vidyut vibhav ke saman.

q:
Which device uses 'Electromagnetic Induction' to stop a moving wheel?
gatiman pahiye ko rokne ke liye kaun sa upkaran 'vidyut chumbakiya preran' ka upyog karta hai?
e: Eddy currents create drag. / bhanwar dharayen khinchav paida karti hain.

q:
What is the 'Flux' unit in CGS?
CGS mein 'flux' ki ikai kya hai?
e: 1 Wb = $10^8$ Maxwell.

q:
What is 'Tesla' in terms of Gauss?
Gauss ke sandarbh mein 'Tesla' kya hai?
e: 1 Tesla = 10,000 Gauss.

q:
What is 'Curie's Law' constant unit?
'curie ke niyam' ke niyatank ki ikai kya hai?
e: From $\chi = C/T$. / $\chi = C/T$ se.

q:
Which part of ear is 'Pinna'?
kaan ka kaun sa bhag 'pinna' hai?
e: Revision: Collects sound waves. / revision: dhwani tarangein ikatha karta hai.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' for a 'Perfect Diamagnet'?
ek 'purn prati-chumbak' ke liye 'chumbakiya pravritti' kya hai?
e: Total expulsion of field lines. / kshetra rekhaon ka purn nishkasan.

q:
What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if current changes by 2A/s and EMF is 10V?
दो कुंडलियों का अन्योन्य प्रेरकत्व क्या होगा यदि करंट 2A/s से बदलता है और EMF 10V है?

What is 'Flux Leakage' in a transformer?
transformer mein 'flux leakage' kya hai?
o: Loss of energy | oorja ki hani
e: Primary flux not linking secondary. / prathmik flux ka dwitiyak se na judna.

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of 'Induced Current'?
'prerit dhara' ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
e: Opposes the change in flux. / flux badlav ka virodh karta hai.

q:
What is 'Step-up Transformer' efficiency?
transformer ki dakshta ka sutra kya hai?
o: Output Power / Input Power | output shakti / input shakti
e: Ratio of power levels. / shakti staron ka anupat.

q:
What is the speed of sound in 'Aluminium'?
'aluminium' mein dhwani ki chaal kya hai?
e: Revision: High speed in solids. / revision: thoson mein uchh gati.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Antimony'?
'antimony' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: It is a diamagnetic substance. / ye ek prati-chumbakiya padarth hai.

q:
Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding'?
'chumbakiya parirakshan' ke liye kya upyog hota hai?
e: High permeability alloy. / uchh pargamyata wali mishra dhatu.

q:
What is 'Aclinic Line'?
'aclinic rekha' kya hai?
e: Line of zero dip. / shunya nati kon wali rekha.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a long solenoid proportional to?
ek lambi perinalika ka sw-prerakatva kiske samanupati hai?
e: Inductance increases with square of turns. / phero ke varg ke saath badhta hai.

q:
What is 'Energy' in an inductor?
prerak mein sanchit 'oorja' kya hai?
e: Stored in magnetic field. / chumbakiya kshetra mein sanchit.

q:
What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area for steel compared to soft iron?
soft iron ki tulna mein steel ka hysteresis loop kshetraphal kya hai?
e: Steel has more energy loss per cycle. / steel mein prati chakra zyada oorja hani hoti hai.

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of force on a moving charge?
gatiman avesh par bal ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Fleming's Left-hand rule | Fleming ka baayein hath ka niyam
e: Thumb = Force, Forefinger = Field. / angutha = bal, tarjani = kshetra.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Induction' at center of circular loop?
vrittakar loop ke kendra par chumbakiya preran kya hai?
e: Field is strongest at the center. / kendra par kshetra sabse mazboot hota hai.

q:
What is the 'Flux' linkage for 50 turns with 0.1 Wb flux each?
50 phero ka flux linkage kya hoga yadi har phere mein 0.1 Wb hai?

What is 'Self Inductance' of a straight wire?
seedhe tar ka sw-prerakatva kya hai?
e: Inductance depends on loop geometry. / prerakatva loop ki jyamiti par nirbhar karta hai.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Liquid Oxygen'?
'liquid oxygen' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: Oxygen is paramagnetic. / oxygen anu-chumbakiya hai.

q:
What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?
soft iron ki 'nigrahita' (Coercivity) kya hai?
e: Easy to demagnetize. / vichumbakit karna aasan hai.

q:
Which part of ear has 'Hammer' bone?
kaan ke kis bhag mein 'hammer' haddi hoti hai?
e: Revision point. / revision point.

q:
What is 'Tesla' unit for?
'Tesla' kiski ikai hai?
e: Standard SI unit. / manak SI ikai.

q:
What is the 'Flux' through 10 turns with 1 Weber flux each?
10 phero ka flux linkage kya hoga yadi har phere mein 1 Weber hai?
e: Total linkage is $N\Phi$. / kul linkage $N\Phi$ hai.

q:
What happens to the 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of a Ferromagnetic material when it is heated above its Curie temperature?
Lauh-chumbakiya padarth ko Curie tapman se upar garam karne par uski 'chumbakiya pravritti' ka kya hota hai?
o: Follows Curie-Weiss Law (becomes paramagnetic) | Curie-Weiss niyam ka palan karti hai (anu-chumbakiya ho jati hai)
e: Above Curie point, the alignment is lost and it behaves like a paramagnetic material. / Curie bindu se upar, sanrekhan khatam ho jata hai aur ye anu-chumbakiya ki tarah vyavhar karta hai.

q:
What is the 'SI Unit' of Magnetic Intensity (H)?
Chumbakiya teevrata (H) ki 'SI ikai' kya hai?
e: H represents the magnetizing force, distinct from B (induction). / H chumbakan bal ko darshata hai.

q:
Which component of 'Maxwell's Equations' states that there are no 'Magnetic Monopoles'?
Maxwell ke samikaranon ka kaun sa bhag batata hai ki 'chumbakiya ekal dhruv' nahi hote?
o:
Gauss's Law for Magnetism ($
abla \cdot B = 0$) | Magnetism ke liye Gauss ka niyam
e: The divergence of the magnetic field is always zero. / Chumbakiya kshetra ka divergence hamesha shunya hota hai.

q:
What is the 'Lorentz Force' direction for an electron moving North in a field pointing Upwards?
Ek electron jo Uttar ki aur ja raha hai aur kshetra Upar ki aur hai, us par 'Lorentz bal' ki disha kya hogi?
e: Using Fleming's Left Hand Rule and accounting for negative charge. / Fleming ke baayein hath ke niyam aur rinatmak avesh ko dhyan mein rakhte hue.

q:
What is the 'Work Done' by a magnetic field on a stationary charge?
Ek sthir avesh par chumbakiya kshetra dwara kiya gaya 'karya' kya hota hai?
e: Magnetic fields only exert force on moving charges. / Chumbakiya kshetra sirf gatiman aveshon par bal lagate hain.

q:
Which material has a 'Permeability' less than that of free space ($\mu < \mu_0$)?
Kis padarth ki 'pargamyata' mukt sthan se kam hoti hai?
e: Diamagnetic materials oppose the external field slightly. / Prati-chumbakiya padarth baahri kshetra ka thoda virodh karte hain.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Hysteresis' primarily caused by?
'Chumbakiya hysteresis' ka mukhya karan kya hai?
o: Molecular friction / Domain realignment delay | Domain sanrekhan mein deri
e: Internal friction between magnetic domains causes energy loss. / Chumbakiya domains ke beech ka aantrik gharshan oorja hani paida karta hai.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a coil of 200 turns if current of 2A produces 1 Wb flux linkage?
200 phero wali coil ka sw-prerakatva kya hai yadi 2A current 1 Wb flux linkage paida kare?
e: $L = 	ext{Total Flux Linkage} / 	ext{Current} = 1 / 2 = 0.5$ H. / Sw-prerakatva = kul flux linkage / current.

q:
What is the 'Effective Length' of a bar magnet compared to its 'Geometric Length'?
Ek bar chumbak ki 'prabhavi lambai' uski 'jyamitiya lambai' ki tulna mein kya hoti hai?
e: Poles are slightly inside the ends of the magnet. / Dhruv chumbak ke kinaron se thoda andar hote hain.

q:
Which 'Law' is used to define the unit of magnetic flux 'Weber'?
Chumbakiya flux ki ikai 'Weber' ko paribhashit karne ke liye kis 'niyam' ka upyog hota hai?
e: 1 Weber is the flux that induces 1 Volt in 1 second. / 1 Weber wo flux hai jo 1 second mein 1 Volt prerit karta hai.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' for a 'Perfect Diamagnet' like a Superconductor?
Superconductor jaise 'purn prati-chumbak' ke liye 'chumbakiya pravritti' kya hai?
e: Perfectly cancels the internal magnetic field (Meissner Effect). / Aantrik chumbakiya kshetra ko puri tarah khatam kar deta hai.

q:
Which part of ear is the 'Cochlea'?
Kaan ka 'Cochlea' kaun sa bhag hai?
e: Revision: Hearing organ. / Revision point.

q:
What is the 'Energy Density' of a magnetic field B in vacuum?
Nirvat mein chumbakiya kshetra B ki 'oorja ghnatv' kya hai?
e: Energy stored per unit volume in the field. / Kshetra mein prati ikai aaytan sanchit oorja.

q:
What is 'Remanence' in a magnetic cycle?
Chumbakiya chakra mein 'Remanence' kya hai?
o: Magnetism remaining at zero field | Shunya kshetra par bacha hua chumbaktva
e: Also called residual magnetism. / Ise avshesh chumbaktva bhi kehte hain.

q:
Which device uses 'Mutual Induction' to transfer energy between circuits?
Circuit ke beech oorja sthanantaran ke liye kaun sa upkaran 'anyonya preran' ka upyog karta hai?
e: Transfers power via magnetic coupling. / Chumbakiya coupling ke madyam se power transfer karta hai.

q:
What happens to the speed of sound in 'Steel' if its temperature increases?
Steel mein dhwani ki chaal ka kya hoga yadi uska tapman badh jaye?
e: Revision: Speed in solids generally increases with temperature. / Revision point.

q:
What is the 'Magnetic Dip' angle at the 'Magnetic Poles' of Earth?
Prithvi ke 'chumbakiya dhruvon' par 'nati kon' kitna hota hai?
e: The field is strictly vertical at the poles. / Dhruvon par kshetra bilkul lumbvat hota hai.

q:
What is 'Tesla' in terms of 'Gauss'?
'Tesla' Gauss ke sandarbh mein kya hai?
e: 1 Tesla = 10,000 Gauss. / 1 Tesla = 10,000 Gauss.

q:
What is 'Step-up Transformer' effect on 'Secondary Current'?
Step-up transformer ka 'secondary current' par kya prabhav padta hai?
e: To conserve power, current must drop as voltage rises. / Voltage badhne par current ghatna chahiye.

q:
Which material is used for 'Core' of permanent magnets?
Sthayi chumbak ke 'Core' ke liye kis padarth ka upyog hota hai?
e: Requires high coercivity. / Uchh nigrahita ki zarurat hoti hai.

q:
What is the 'SI Unit' of intensity of magnetization ($M$)?
Chumbakan ki teevrata (M) ki 'SI ikai' kya hai?
e: Magnetic moment per unit volume. / Prati ikai aaytan chumbakiya aghurn.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Potential' at a point on the equatorial line of a magnet?
Chumbak ki nirakshiya rekha par kisi bindu par 'chumbakiya vibhav' kya hai?
e: Potential from N and S poles cancel each other. / N aur S dhruvon se vibhav ek dusre ko khatam kar dete hain.

q:
Which rule gives the direction of 'Induced Current' in a generator?
Generator mein 'prerit dhara' ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Fleming's Right-hand rule | Fleming ka daayein hath ka niyam
e: Used for generators (Left hand is for motors). / Generator ke liye upyog hota hai.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a long solenoid proportional to 'Number of turns' ($N$)?
Ek lambi perinalika ka 'sw-prerakatva' phero ki sankhya (N) ke saath kaise badalta hai?
e: Inductance depends on the square of the turns. / Prerakatva phero ke varg par nirbhar karta hai.

q:
What is 'Agonic Line'?
'Agonic Line' kya hai?
e: Line joining places where magnetic north and true north coincide. / Shunya chumbakiya dikpat wale sthano ko jodne wali rekha.

q:
What is 'Relative Permeability' ($\mu_r$) of a paramagnetic material?
Anu-chumbakiya padarth ki 'sapeksh pargamyata' ($\mu_r$) kya hoti hai?
e: Slightly greater than unity. / Ek se thodi adhik.

q:
What is 'Eddy Current' loss in transformer minimized by?
Transformer mein 'Eddy current' nuksan kaise kam kiya jata hai?
o: Lamination of core | Core ka lamination
e: Using thin insulated sheets to break current loops. / Current loops ko todne ke liye patli insulated sheets ka upyog.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Water'?
'Pani' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: Water is a diamagnetic substance. / Pani ek prati-chumbakiya padarth hai.

q:
Which part of ear has 'Stirrup' bone?
Kaan ke kis bhag mein 'Stirrup' haddi hoti hai?
e: Revision: Part of middle ear ossicles. / Revision point.

q:
What is the 'Flux' through a unit area called?
Ikai kshetraphal se guzarne wala 'Flux' kya kehlata hai?
e: Also known as magnetic flux density. / Ise flux ghnatv bhi kehte hain.

q:
What is the speed of EM waves in vacuum approx?
Nirvat mein EM tarango ki chaal kya hai?
e: Travel at light speed. / Prakash ki chaal se chalti hain.

q:
What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area representing?
'Hysteresis Loop' ka kshetraphal kya darshata hai?
o: Energy loss per cycle | Prati chakra oorja hani
e: Heat loss during magnetization/demagnetization cycle. / Chumbakan/vichumbakan chakra mein ushma hani.

q:
What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if current changes by 5A/s and EMF is 10V?
Do coils ka anyonya prerakatva kya hoga yadi current 5A/s se badle aur EMF 10V ho?

Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding'?
'Chumbakiya parirakshan' ke liye kya upyog hota hai?
e: Alloy with very high permeability. / Bahut uchh pargamyata wali mishra dhatu.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' unit 'Henry' equivalent to?
'Henry' kiske barabar hai?
e: From definition $\Phi = LI$. / Paribhasha $\Phi = LI$ se.

q:
What is the speed of sound in 'Vacuum'?
'Nirvat' mein dhwani ki chaal kya hai?
e: Revision: Sound needs a medium. / Revision: Dhwani ko madhyam chahiye.

q:
What is 'Aclinic Line' joining?
'Aclinic Line' kise jodti hai?
o: Zero Dip points | Shunya nati kon wale bindu
e: Represents the Magnetic Equator. / Chumbakiya bhumadhya rekha ko darshati hai.

q:
What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?
Narm lohe ki 'Nigrahita' (Coercivity) kya hoti hai?
e: Easy to demagnetize, good for AC core. / Vichumbakit karna aasan hai.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Liquid Oxygen'?
'Taral oxygen' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: Oxygen is a paramagnetic gas/liquid. / Oxygen ek anu-chumbakiya padarth hai.

q:
Which rule gives the direction of magnetic field for a solenoid?
Perinalika ke liye chumbakiya kshetra ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Right-hand Palm rule | Dayein hath ki hatheli ka niyam
e: Thumb points to North pole if fingers curl with current. / Angutha uttar dhruv batata hai.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Potential' unit?
'Chumbakiya vibhav' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Analogous to V (J/C). / Vidyut vibhav ke saman.

q:
What is 'Tesla' unit for?
'Tesla' kiski ikai hai?
e: Standard SI unit. / Manak SI ikai.

q:
Which part of ear is 'Pinna'?
Kaan ka kaun sa bhag 'Pinna' hai?
e: Revision point. / Revision point.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a straight wire?
Seedhe tar ka sw-prerakatva kya hota hai?
e: Requires a loop to link flux effectively. / Flux linkage ke liye loop chahiye.

q:
What is the number of questions completed in Magnetism now?
Ab tak magnetism mein kul kitne prashn poore ho chuke hain?
e: Progressing towards target! / Lakshya ki aur agrasar!

q:
What is 'Barkhausen Effect' evidence of?
'Barkhausen Effect' kiska praman hai?
e: Shows jerky magnetization due to domain flipping. / Domains ke palatne se hone wale jhatkedar chumbakan ko batata hai.

q:
What is 'Curie Temperature' of 'Nickel'?
'Nickel' ka Curie tapman kya hai?
e: Relatively lower than iron. / Lohe se kam.

q:
What is 'Retentivity' of Steel compared to Soft Iron?
Steel ki 'dharanshilta' narm lohe ki tulna mein kya hai?
e: Soft iron retains more magnetism initially. / Narm loha shuruat mein zyada chumbaktva banaye rakhta hai.

q:
What is 'Coercivity' of Steel compared to Soft Iron?
Steel ki 'nigrahita' narm lohe ki tulna mein kya hai?
e: Hard to demagnetize steel. / Steel ko vichumbakit karna mushkil hai.

q:
What is the 'Torque' ($	au$) acting on a current loop of area $A$ and current $I$ in a magnetic field $B$?
चुंबकीय क्षेत्र $B$ में $A$ क्षेत्रफल और $I$ करंट वाले लूप पर लगने वाला 'बलाघूर्ण' ($	au$) क्या है?
o: $I A B \sin	heta$ | $I A B \sin	heta$
e: Torque is maximum when the plane of the loop is parallel to the field. / बलाघूर्ण तब अधिकतम होता है जब लूप का तल क्षेत्र के समानांतर हो।

q:
What is 'Critical Temperature' ($T_c$) in Superconductivity?
अतिचालकता में 'क्रांतिक तापमान' ($T_c$) क्या है?
o: Temp below which resistance becomes zero | वह तापमान जिसके नीचे प्रतिरोध शून्य हो जाता है
e: Materials lose all electrical resistance below this temperature. / इस तापमान के नीचे पदार्थ अपना सारा विद्युत प्रतिरोध खो देते हैं।

q:
Which material is used to make 'Permanent Magnets' in Loudspeakers?
लाउडस्पीकर में 'स्थायी चुंबक' बनाने के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग किया जाता है?
e: Alnico has high retentivity and coercivity. / एलनिको में उच्च धारणशीलता और निग्राहिता होती है।

q:
What is the 'Magnetic Moment' of a solenoid of $N$ turns, area $A$ and current $I$?
$N$ फेरों, $A$ क्षेत्रफल और $I$ करंट वाली परिनालिका का 'चुंबकीय आघूर्ण' क्या है?
e: Total magnetic moment is the product of turns, current, and area. / कुल चुंबकीय आघूर्ण फेरों, करंट और क्षेत्रफल का गुणनफल है।

q:
What happens to 'Diamagnetism' at 'Absolute Zero'?
'परम शून्य' पर 'प्रति-चुंबकत्व' का क्या होता है?
e: Diamagnetism is temperature independent. / प्रति-चुंबकत्व तापमान पर निर्भर नहीं करता।

q:
What is 'Meissner Effect'?
'मीस्नर प्रभाव' क्या है?
o: Expulsion of magnetic field from a superconductor | अतिचालक से चुंबकीय क्षेत्र का निष्कासन
e: A superconductor acts as a perfect diamagnet. / एक अतिचालक पूर्ण प्रति-चुंबक की तरह कार्य करता है।

q:
Which property is shown by 'Liquid Oxygen' when suspended between poles of a magnet?
चुंबक के ध्रुवों के बीच लटकाए जाने पर 'तरल ऑक्सीजन' कौन सा गुण दिखाती है?
o: Attracted towards stronger field | मजबूत क्षेत्र की ओर आकर्षित
e: Oxygen is paramagnetic and moves toward the stronger magnetic field. / ऑक्सीजन अनुचुंबकीय है और मजबूत क्षेत्र की ओर बढ़ती है।

q:
What is the 'SI Unit' of Magnetic Pole Strength?
चुंबकीय ध्रुव शक्ति की 'SI इकाई' क्या है?
e: Derived from the formula for magnetic moment $M = m 	imes L$. / चुंबकीय आघूर्ण के सूत्र से व्युत्पन्न।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' ($\chi$) of a Diamagnet?
एक प्रति-चुंबक की 'चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति' ($\chi$) क्या है?
o: Small and Negative | छोटी और ऋणात्मक
e: It is negative because magnetization is opposite to the applied field. / यह ऋणात्मक होती है क्योंकि चुंबकन विपरीत दिशा में होता है।

q:
What is the value of 'Relative Permeability' ($\mu_r$) for a 'Superconductor'?
एक 'अतिचालक' के लिए 'सापेक्ष पारगम्यता' ($\mu_r$) का मान क्या है?
e: Due to perfect diamagnetism ($\chi = -1$), $\mu_r = 1 + \chi = 0$. / पूर्ण प्रति-चुंबकत्व के कारण यह शून्य होती है।

q:
Which part of ear converts mechanical vibrations into electrical signals?
कान का कौन सा भाग यांत्रिक कंपनों को विद्युत संकेतों में बदलता है?
e: Revision Point: Inner ear component. / रिवीजन पॉइंट: आंतरिक कान का हिस्सा।

q:
What is the 'Flux' through a unit area called in Tesla?
टेस्ला में प्रति इकाई क्षेत्रफल के फ्लक्स को क्या कहते हैं?
e: Magnetic induction is also known as magnetic flux density. / इसे चुंबकीय फ्लक्स घनत्व भी कहा जाता है।

q:
What is the speed of sound in 'Vacuum'?
'निर्वात' में ध्वनि की चाल क्या है?
e: Revision Point: Sound cannot travel without a medium. / रिवीजन पॉइंट: ध्वनि बिना माध्यम के यात्रा नहीं कर सकती।

q:
Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding' in precision instruments?
सटीक उपकरणों में 'चुंबकीय परिरक्षण' के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग होता है?
o: Soft Iron / Mu-metal | नरम लोहा / म्यू-मेटल
e: Materials with high permeability divert magnetic lines. / उच्च पारगम्यता वाले पदार्थ चुंबकीय रेखाओं को मोड़ देते हैं।

q:
What is 'Curie Temperature' for Iron approx?
लोहे के लिए 'क्यूरी तापमान' लगभग क्या है?
e: Iron becomes paramagnetic above this temperature. / इस तापमान के ऊपर लोहा अनुचुंबकीय हो जाता है।

q:
In a 'Step-down Transformer', what is the ratio of turns ($N_s / N_p$)?
'स्टेप-डाउन ट्रांसफार्मर' में फेरों का अनुपात ($N_s / N_p$) क्या होता है?
e: Secondary has fewer turns to reduce voltage. / वोल्टेज घटाने के लिए सेकेंडरी में कम फेरे होते हैं।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Intensity' (H) at a distance 'r' from a long straight wire?
एक लंबे सीधे तार से 'r' दूरी पर 'चुंबकीय तीव्रता' (H) क्या है?
e: Magnetic intensity depends on current and distance, not on the medium. / चुंबकीय तीव्रता माध्यम पर निर्भर नहीं करती।

q:
What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area used to calculate?
'हिस्टेरेसिस लूप' के क्षेत्रफल का उपयोग क्या गणना करने के लिए किया जाता है?
o: Energy loss as heat | ऊष्मा के रूप में ऊर्जा हानि
e: Represents work done per unit volume per cycle. / यह प्रति चक्र प्रति इकाई आयतन किए गए कार्य को दर्शाता है।

q:
What is 'Tesla' in terms of 'Newton, Ampere, Meter'?
'न्यूटन, एम्पीयर, मीटर' के संदर्भ में 'टेस्ला' क्या है?
e: From $F = BIL$, $B = F/IL$. / सूत्र $B = F/IL$ से।

q:
Which part of ear is 'Pinna'?
कान का कौन सा भाग 'पिन्ना' है?
e: Revision point: Visible part of the ear. / रिवीजन पॉइंट: कान का दिखाई देने वाला हिस्सा।

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a solenoid proportional to length ($l$)?
एक परिनालिका का 'स्व-प्रेरकत्व' लंबाई ($l$) के कैसे संबंधित है?
e: For a fixed number of turns, inductance is inversely proportional to length. / निश्चित फेरों के लिए प्रेरकत्व लंबाई के व्युत्क्रमानुपाती होता है।

q:
What is 'Eddy Current' loss in a transformer core minimized by?
ट्रांसफार्मर कोर में 'भंवर धारा' हानि को कैसे कम किया जाता है?
o: Using laminated core | लैमिनेटेड कोर का उपयोग करके
e: Thin insulated sheets break the current paths. / पतली इंसुलेटेड शीट्स करंट के रास्तों को तोड़ देती हैं।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' for a Vacuum?
निर्वात के लिए 'चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति' क्या है?
e: Vacuum cannot be magnetized. / निर्वात को चुंबकित नहीं किया जा सकता।

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field for a circular current loop?
वृत्ताकार करंट लूप के लिए चुंबकीय क्षेत्र की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
o: Right-hand Palm rule | दाएं हाथ की हथेली का नियम
e: Fingers curl with current, thumb points to North pole. / उंगलियां करंट के साथ मुड़ती हैं, अंगूठा उत्तर ध्रुव बताता है।

q:
What is 'Aclinic Line' joining points of?
'एक्लिनिक रेखा' किन बिंदुओं को जोड़ती है?
e: It represents the Magnetic Equator. / यह चुंबकीय भूमध्य रेखा को दर्शाती है।

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' unit 'Henry' equivalent to?
'हेनरी' किसके बराबर है?
e: From $\Phi = LI$. / $\Phi = LI$ से।

q:
Which material has susceptibility $\chi < 0$?
किस पदार्थ की प्रवृत्ति $\chi < 0$ होती है?
e: Diamagnetic materials have small negative susceptibility. / प्रति-चुंबकीय पदार्थों की प्रवृत्ति ऋणात्मक होती है।

q:
What is the 'Flux' through a unit area perpendicular to the field?
क्षेत्र के लंबवत इकाई क्षेत्रफल से गुजरने वाला 'फ्लक्स' क्या है?
e: Also called magnetic flux density. / इसे चुंबकीय फ्लक्स घनत्व भी कहते हैं।

q:
What is 'Intensity of Magnetization' for a vacuum?
निर्वात के लिए 'चुंबकन की तीव्रता' क्या है?
e: Vacuum has no atoms to magnetize. / निर्वात में चुंबकित करने के लिए कोई परमाणु नहीं होते।

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a straight wire?
सीधे तार का 'स्व-प्रेरकत्व' क्या है?
e: Inductance requires a loop to link flux. / फ्लक्स को जोड़ने के लिए प्रेरकत्व को लूप की आवश्यकता होती है।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Potential' unit?
'चुंबकीय विभव' की इकाई क्या है?
e: Work done to bring a unit North pole from infinity. / इकाई उत्तरी ध्रुव को अनंत से लाने में किया गया कार्य।

q:
Which part of ear is 'Snail shaped'?
कान का कौन सा भाग 'घोंघे के आकार' का है?
e: Revision point. / रिवीजन पॉइंट।

q:
What is 'Flux' in CGS system?
CGS प्रणाली में 'फ्लक्स' की इकाई क्या है?

q:

q:
What is 'Retentivity' of Steel compared to Soft Iron?
नरम लोहे की तुलना में स्टील की 'धारणशीलता' क्या है?

q:

e: It reduces the energy transfer efficiency between coils. / yah coils ke beech oorja sthanantaran ki dakshta ko kam karta hai.

q:

q:

q:

What is 'Magnetic Retentivity' of a material used for 'Electromagnets' ideally?

q:

q:
What is 'Tesla' in terms of 'Weber' and 'Meter'?

q:

e: Ferromagnetic materials are strongly attracted to magnets. / लौह-चुंबकीय पदार्थ चुंबकों की ओर मजबूती से आकर्षित होते हैं।

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' unit 'Henry' in base SI units?
'हेनरी' मूल SI इकाइयों में क्या है?
o: $kg \cdot m^2 \cdot s^{-2} \cdot A^{-2}$ | $kg \cdot m^2 \cdot s^{-2} \cdot A^{-2}$
e: Derived from energy $U = 1/2 LI^2$. / ऊर्जा के सूत्र $U = 1/2 LI^2$ से व्युत्पन्न।

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field due to a straight current?
सीधे करंट के कारण चुंबकीय क्षेत्र की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
o: Right-hand Thumb Rule | दाएं हाथ के अंगूठे का नियम
e: Thumb points to current, fingers curl in field direction. / अंगूठा करंट की दिशा में, उंगलियां क्षेत्र की दिशा में।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Intensity' (H) for a solenoid independent of?
एक परिनालिका के लिए 'चुंबकीय तीव्रता' (H) किससे स्वतंत्र है?
e: H depends only on current and geometry ($H = nI$). / H केवल करंट और ज्यामिति पर निर्भर करती है।

q:
What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area representing energy loss as?
हिस्टेरेसिस लूप का क्षेत्रफल ऊर्जा हानि को किस रूप में दर्शाता है?
e: Caused by domain friction during magnetization. / चुंबकन के दौरान डोमेन घर्षण के कारण।

q:
What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if current in one changes by 1 A/s and induced EMF in other is 1V?
यदि एक कुंडली में करंट 1 A/s से बदलता है और दूसरी में 1V EMF प्रेरित होता है, तो अन्योन्य प्रेरकत्व क्या है?

What is the speed of light in vacuum related to $\mu_0$ and $\epsilon_0$?
निर्वात में प्रकाश की चाल $\mu_0$ और $\epsilon_0$ से कैसे संबंधित है?
e: Fundamental electromagnetic relationship. / मौलिक विद्युत चुंबकीय संबंध।

q:
What is 'Relative Permeability' of a 'Superconductor'?
'अतिचालक' की 'सापेक्ष पारगम्यता' क्या है?
e: Expels all magnetic lines, so $\mu_r = 0$. / सभी चुंबकीय रेखाओं को बाहर निकाल देता है।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Antimony'?
'एंटीमनी' की 'चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति' क्या है?
e: It is a diamagnetic substance. / यह एक प्रति-चुंबकीय पदार्थ है।

q:
What is the unit of 'Magnetic Flux' in CGS?
CGS में 'चुंबकीय फ्लक्स' की इकाई क्या है?
e: $1 Weber = 10^8 Maxwell$. / मैक्सवेल छोटी CGS इकाई है।

q:
What is 'Aclinic Line'?
'एक्लिनिक रेखा' क्या है?
e: Line joining points where dip is zero. / वह रेखा जहाँ झुकाव शून्य है।

q:
Which part of ear is 'Snail shaped'?
कान का कौन सा भाग 'घोंघे के आकार' का है?
e: Revision: Inner ear hearing component. / रिवीजन: आंतरिक कान का सुनने वाला भाग।

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of an ideal inductor with zero resistance?
शून्य प्रतिरोध वाले 'आदर्श प्रेरक' का स्व-प्रेरकत्व क्या है?
e: Depends only on geometric factors. / केवल ज्यामितीय कारकों पर निर्भर करता है।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Potential' unit?
'चुंबकीय विभव' की इकाई क्या है?
e: Work done to move a unit pole. / इकाई ध्रुव को घुमाने में किया गया कार्य।

q:
What is the speed of light in vacuum approx?
निर्वात में प्रकाश की चाल लगभग क्या है?
e: Standard constant for all electromagnetic waves. / सभी विद्युत चुंबकीय तरंगों के लिए मानक नियतांक।

q:
What is 'Eddy Current' loss minimized in motors by?
मोटरों में 'भंवर धारा' हानि को किसके द्वारा कम किया जाता है?
e: Prevents large current loops in the metal. / धातु में बड़े करंट लूप को रोकता है।

q:
What is 'Agonic Line'?
'एगोनिक रेखा' क्या है?
o: Zero Declination line | शून्य दिकपात रेखा
e: Joins places where magnetic north and true north are same. / उन स्थानों को जोड़ती है जहाँ चुंबकीय उत्तर और वास्तविक उत्तर एक ही हैं।

q:
Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding'?
'चुंबकीय परिरक्षण' के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग होता है?
e: High permeability alloy. / उच्च पारगम्यता वाली मिश्र धातु।

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a long solenoid proportional to?
एक लंबी परिनालिका का स्व-प्रेरकत्व किसके समानुपाती है?
e: Increases with the square of number of turns. / फेरों की संख्या के वर्ग के साथ बढ़ता है।

q:
What is 'Energy' stored in a magnetic field formula?
चुंबकीय क्षेत्र में संचित 'ऊर्जा' का सूत्र क्या है?
e: Stored in the inductor when current flows. / करंट बहने पर प्रेरक में संचित।

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of 'Induced current'?
'प्रेरित धारा' की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
e: Opposes the change in magnetic flux. / चुंबकीय फ्लक्स में बदलाव का विरोध करती है।

q:
What is the frequency of 'Household AC' in India?
भारत में 'घरेलू AC' की आवृत्ति क्या है?
e: Standard utility frequency. / मानक उपयोगिता आवृत्ति।

q:
What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?
नरम लोहे की 'निग्राहिता' क्या है?
e: Easy to demagnetize. / विचुंबकित करना आसान है।

q:
Which part of ear has 'Hammer' bone?
कान के किस भाग में 'हैमर' हड्डी होती है?
e: Revision Point. / रिवीजन पॉइंट।

q:
What is 'Tesla' unit for?
'टेस्ला' किसकी इकाई है?
e: Standard SI unit for B. / B के लिए मानक SI इकाई।

q:
What is 'Flux' linkage for 50 turns with 0.1 Weber each?
50 फेरों के लिए फ्लक्स लिंकेज क्या है, जिसमें प्रति फेरा 0.1 वेबर है?
e: $N \times \Phi = 50 \times 0.1 = 5$ Weber-turns. / कुल फ्लक्स लिंकेज।

q:
Which material is used for 'Core' of a transformer?
ट्रांसफार्मर के 'कोर' के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग होता है?
e: Reduces energy loss due to hysteresis. / हिस्टेरेसिस के कारण ऊर्जा हानि को कम करता है।

q:
What is the unit of 'Magnetic Dipole Moment' per unit volume?
प्रति इकाई आयतन 'चुंबकीय द्विध्रुव आघूर्ण' की इकाई क्या है?
e: Also called intensity of magnetization. / इसे चुंबकन की तीव्रता भी कहते हैं।

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field for a circular current loop?
वृत्ताकार करंट लूप के लिए चुंबकीय क्षेत्र की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
o: Right-hand Palm rule | दाएं हाथ की हथेली का नियम
e: Thumb points to North pole if fingers curl with current. / अंगूठा उत्तर ध्रुव बताता है।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Liquid Oxygen'?
'तरल ऑक्सीजन' की चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति क्या है?
e: Oxygen is paramagnetic. / ऑक्सीजन अनुचुंबकीय है।

q:
What is 'Barkhausen Effect' evidence of?
'बरखौसेन प्रभाव' किसका प्रमाण है?
e: Shows jerky realignment of domains. / डोमेन के झटकेदार पुनर्गठन को दिखाता है।

q:
What is 'Tesla' in terms of Gauss?
गॉस के संदर्भ में 'टेस्ला' क्या है?

Which material is used for 'Permanent Magnets' like Alnico?
एलनिको जैसे 'स्थायी चुंबक' के लिए क्या आवश्यक है?
e: Ensures it stays magnetic. / यह सुनिश्चित करता है कि वह चुंबकीय बना रहे।

q:
What is the magnetism target completed now?
मैग्नेटिज्म में अब तक कितने प्रश्न पूरे हो चुके हैं?
e: 700 questions of Magnetism reached! / मैग्नेटिज्म के 700 प्रश्न पूरे हुए!

q:
What is 'Type I' Superconductor also known as?
'Type I' ati-chalak ko aur kya kaha jata hai?
e: They show complete Meissner effect and have a single critical field. / Ye purn Meissner prabhav dikhate hain aur inka ek hi krantik kshetra hota hai.

q:
What is 'Type II' Superconductor also known as?
'Type II' ati-chalak ko aur kya kaha jata hai?
e: They have two critical fields and are used for making strong electromagnets. / Inke do krantik kshetra hote hain aur ye shaktishali vidyut-chumbak banane mein upyog hote hain.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Flux Quantization' unit called?
'Chumbakiya flux quantization' ki ikai ko kya kehte hain?
e: The smallest unit of magnetic flux in a superconductor. / Ati-chalak mein chumbakiya flux ki sabse chhoti ikai.

q:
Which part of ear converts vibrations into neural signals?
Kaan ka kaun sa bhag kampano ko tantrika sanketon mein badalta hai?
e: Revision Point: Hearing organ mechanism. / Revision point: Sun-ne ki prakriya.

q:
What is the 'SI Unit' of Magnetic Susceptibility per unit mass?
Prati ikai dravyman chumbakiya pravritti ki 'SI ikai' kya hai?
e: Calculated by dividing volume susceptibility by density. / Ise ghnatv se bhag dekar nikala jata hai.

q:
What happens to the 'Relative Permeability' of a paramagnetic material as temperature decreases?
Anu-chumbakiya padarth ki 'sapeksh pargamyata' ka kya hota hai jab tapman ghat-ta hai?
e: According to Curie's Law, susceptibility increases at lower temperatures. / Curie ke niyam ke anusar, kam tapman par pravritti badhti hai.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Hysteresis' area proportional to?
'Chumbakiya hysteresis' kshetraphal kiske samanupati hai?
o: Energy loss per cycle | Prati chakra oorja hani
e: Represents the heat energy dissipated during magnetization. / Chumbakan ke dauran nikalne wali ushma oorja ko darshata hai.

q:
Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding' in MRI rooms?
MRI rooms mein 'chumbakiya parirakshan' ke liye kis padarth ka upyog hota hai?
e: Requires materials with high permeability to contain magnetic fields. / Chumbakiya kshetra ko rokne ke liye uchh pargamyata wale padarth chahiye.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a solenoid of length $l$, area $A$ and turns $n$ per unit length?
Solenoid ka sw-prerakatva (L) kya hai?
o: $\mu_0 n^2 A l$ | $\mu_0 n^2 A l$
e: Formula for inductance based on dimensions. / Jyamitiya aadhar par prerakatva ka sutra.

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field produced by a current-carrying solenoid?
Dharavahi solenoid dwara paida chumbakiya kshetra ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Right-hand Thumb rule | Dayein hath ke anguthe ka niyam
e: Fingers curl in current direction, thumb points to North pole. / Ungliyan current ki disha mein, angutha uttar dhruv batata hai.

q:
What is 'Eddy Current' loss in a transformer core proportional to?
Transformer core mein 'bhanwar dhara' hani kiske samanupati hai?
e: Eddy current losses increase rapidly with AC frequency. / AC aavritti ke saath nuksan tezi se badhta hai.

q:
What is the 'Flux' through 50 turns if each has 0.5 Weber flux linkage?
50 phero mein flux linkage kya hoga yadi har phere mein 0.5 Weber hai?
e: Flux Linkage $\Lambda = N\Phi = 50 	imes 0.5 = 25$. / Kul flux linkage.

q:
Which part of ear is 'Anvil' bone related to?
'Anvil' haddi kaan ke kis bhag se sambandhit hai?
e: Revision: Part of ear ossicles (Incus). / Revision point.

q:
What is 'Step-up Transformer' voltage ratio ($V_s / V_p$)?
Step-up transformer ka voltage anupat kya hota hai?
e: Increases primary voltage to a higher secondary voltage. / Primary voltage ko badha deta hai.

q:
What is the speed of sound in 'Steel' approx?
'Steel' mein dhwani ki chaal lagbhag kya hai?
e: Revision: Sound speed in solids. / Revision point.

q:
What is 'Tesla' in terms of 'Weber' and 'Meter'?
'Tesla' Weber aur meter ke sandarbh mein kya hai?
e: 1 Tesla = 1 Weber per square meter. / 1 Tesla = 1 Weber prati varg meter.

q:
Which material has susceptibility $\chi < 0$?
Kaun sa padarth $\chi < 0$ pravritti dikhata hai?
e: Diamagnetic materials have small negative susceptibility. / Prati-chumbakiya padarthon ki pravritti rinatmak hoti hai.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Intensity' (H) inside a solenoid independent of?
Solenoid ke andar 'chumbakiya teevrata' (H) kisse swatantra hai?
e: H depends only on I and n. / H sirf I aur n par nirbhar karti hai.

q:
What is 'Hysteresis Curve' for a 'Diamagnetic' substance?
Prati-chumbakiya padarth ke liye 'hysteresis curve' kaisa hota hai?
e: Diamagnets do not show hysteresis. / Prati-chumbak hysteresis nahi dikhate.

q:
What is 'Aclinic Line' joining?
'Aclinic line' kise jodti hai?
o: Zero dip points | Shunya nati kon wale bindu
e: Represents the Magnetic Equator. / Chumbakiya bhumadhya rekha ko darshati hai.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of an ideal inductor with zero resistance?
Shunya pratirodh wale adarsh prerak ka sw-prerakatva kya hai?
e: Depends only on geometric factors. / Sirf jyamitiya karako par nirbhar.

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of 'Induced current'?
'Prerit dhara' ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
e: Always opposes the change that caused it. / Hamesha badlav ka virodh karti hai.

q:
What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?
Narm lohe ki 'nigrahita' (Coercivity) kaisi hoti hai?
e: Easy to demagnetize. / Vichumbakit karna aasan hai.

q:
Which part of ear is 'Hammer' bone?
'Hammer' haddi kaan ke kis bhag mein hoti hai?
e: Revision point. / Revision point.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Potential' unit?
'Chumbakiya vibhav' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Analogous to electric potential. / Vidyut vibhav ke saman.

q:
What is 'Tesla' in terms of Gauss?
'Tesla' Gauss ke sandarbh mein kya hai?
e: 1 Tesla = 10,000 Gauss.

q:
What is 'Curie's Law' constant unit?
'Curie ke niyam' ke niyatank ki ikai kya hai?
e: From $\chi = C/T$. / $\chi = C/T$ se.

q:
Which part of ear is 'Pinna'?
Kaan ka 'Pinna' kaun sa bhag hai?
e: Revision Point. / Revision point.

q:
What is the speed of light in vacuum related to $\mu_0$?
Nirvat mein prakash ki chaal $\mu_0$ se kaise judi hai?
e: Fundamental electromagnetic relation. / Maulik sambandh.

q:
What is 'Flux Leakage' in a transformer?
Transformer mein 'flux leakage' kya hai?
o: Loss of energy | Oorja ki hani
e: Primary flux not linking secondary. / Primary flux ka secondary se na judna.

q:
Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding'?
'Chumbakiya parirakshan' ke liye kya upyog hota hai?
e: High permeability alloy. / Uchh pargamyata wali mishra-dhatu.

q:
What is 'Relative Permeability' of a superconductor?
Superconductor ki 'sapeksh pargamyata' kya hoti hai?
e: Perfect diamagnetism results in zero permeability. / Purn prati-chumbaktva ke karan shunya pargamyata.

q:
What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if current changes by 2A/s and EMF is 10V?
Do coils ka anyonya prerakatva kya hai yadi current 2A/s se badle aur EMF 10V ho?

Which 'Rule' gives the direction of force on a moving charge?
Gatiman avesh par bal ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Fleming's Left-hand rule | Fleming ka baayein hath ka niyam
e: Thumb = Force, Forefinger = Field. / Angutha = bal, tarjani = kshetra.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Induction' at center of circular loop?
Vrittakar loop ke kendra par chumbakiya preran kya hai?
e: Strongest field is at the center. / Kendra par kshetra sabse mazboot hota hai.

q:
What is the 'Flux' linkage for 100 turns if each has 0.2 Weber flux?
100 phero ka flux linkage kya hoga yadi har phere mein 0.2 Weber hai?

What is 'Barkhausen Effect' evidence of?
'Barkhausen effect' kiska praman hai?
e: Shows domain alignment steps. / Domain sanrekhan dikhata hai.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Antimony'?
'Antimony' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: It is a diamagnetic substance. / Ye ek prati-chumbakiya padarth hai.

q:
Which material is used for 'Permanent Magnets' like Alnico?
Alnico jaise sthayi chumbak ke liye kya zaruri hai?
o: High retentivity and high coercivity | Uchh dharanshilta aur uchh nigrahita
e: Ensures magnet stays strong. / Chumbak ko mazboot banaye rakhta hai.

q:
What is 'Agonic Line'?
'Agonic line' kya hai?
e: Joins places where magnetic north is same as true north. / Shunya dikpat wale sthano ko jodti hai.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Flux' unit in SI?
SI mein 'Chumbakiya flux' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Standard SI unit. / Manak SI ikai.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a long solenoid proportional to?
Solenoid ka sw-prerakatva kiske samanupati hai?
e: Increases with square of turns. / Phero ke varg ke saath badhta hai.

q:
What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area for steel compared to soft iron?
Steel ka hysteresis loop narm lohe ki tulna mein kaisa hai?
e: Steel has more energy loss. / Steel mein zyada oorja hani hoti hai.

q:
What is the speed of sound in 'Hydrogen'?
'Hydrogen' mein dhwani ki chaal kya hai?
e: Revision Point. / Revision point.

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field for a solenoid?
Solenoid ke liye chumbakiya kshetra ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Right-hand Palm rule | Dayein hath ki hatheli ka niyam
e: Thumb = North pole, Fingers = Current. / Angutha = uttar dhruv.

q:
What is 'Tesla' unit for?
'Tesla' kiski ikai hai?
e: SI unit of flux density. / Flux ghnatv ki SI ikai.

q:
Which part of ear is 'Snail shaped'?
Kaan ka kaun sa bhag 'ghonghe ke aakar' ka hai?
e: Revision point. / Revision point.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a straight wire?
Seedhe tar ka sw-prerakatva kya hai?
e: Inductance requires a flux link via loop. / Prerakatva ke liye loop chahiye.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Liquid Oxygen'?
'Liquid oxygen' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: It is paramagnetic. / Ye anu-chumbakiya hai.

q:
Which 'Rare Earth' element is used to make the strongest permanent magnets?
Sabse shaktishali sthayi chumbak banane ke liye kis 'Rare Earth' tatva ka upyog hota hai?
e: Neodymium-Iron-Boron (NdFeB) magnets are the strongest known permanent magnets. / Neodymium chumbak sabse shaktishali hote hain.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Polar Reversal' (Geomagnetic Reversal)?
'Chumbakiya dhruv ulatna' (Geomagnetic Reversal) kya hai?
o: Change in Earth's field direction | Prithvi ke kshetra ki disha badalna
e: A change in Earth's magnetic field such that the positions of magnetic north and south are interchanged. / Prithvi ke uttar aur dakshin chumbakiya dhruvon ka aapas mein badal jana.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' ($\chi$) for a 'Paramagnetic' material at very high temperatures?
Bahut uchh tapman par 'Anu-chumbakiya' padarth ki 'chumbakiya pravritti' ($\chi$) kaisi hoti hai?
e: As per Curie's Law, susceptibility is inversely proportional to temperature. / Tapman badhne par pravritti ghat jati hai.

q:
What is 'Ferrite' used in high-frequency applications?
Uchh-aavritti (High-frequency) upyog mein 'Ferrite' kya hai?
e: Ferrites are ceramic materials with high permeability but very low electrical conductivity. / Ferrites ki chalakta kam hoti hai isliye eddy current nuksan kam hota hai.

q:
Which part of ear converts sound pressure waves into fluid waves?
Kaan ka kaun sa bhag dhwani dabav tarango ko drav tarango mein badalta hai?
e: Vibrations of stapes against the oval window move the fluid in the cochlea. / Stapes ki halchal se cochlea ke drav mein tarangein banti hain.

q:
What is the 'SI Unit' of Magnetic Permeability of a medium?
Kisi madhyam ki chumbakiya pargamyata ki 'SI ikai' kya hai?
e: Permeability ($\mu$) is measured in Henry per meter. / Pargamyata ki ikai Henry prati meter hai.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Saturation'?
'Chumbakiya santripti' (Magnetic Saturation) kya hai?
o: Maximum magnetization limit | Chumbakan ki adhiktam seema
e: State where all magnetic domains are aligned and no further magnetization is possible. / Wo avastha jahan saare domains ek disha mein ho jayein.

q:
What is the relation between 'Magnetic Moment' ($M$) and 'Pole Strength' ($m$)?
'Chumbakiya aghurn' (M) aur 'Dhruv shakti' (m) ke beech kya sambandh hai?
o: $M = m 	imes L$ | $M = m 	imes L$

e: H depends only on excitation current and geometry. / H sirf current aur jyamiti par nirbhar karti hai.

q:
What is 'Tesla' in terms of Gauss?
Gauss ke sandarbh mein 'Tesla' kya hai?
e: $1 Tesla = 10,000 Gauss$.

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of 'Induced current'?
'prerit dhara' ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
e: Based on energy conservation. / oorja sanrakshan par aadharit.

q:
What is 'Aclinic Line' joining?
'aclinic rekha' kise jodti hai?
o: Zero dip points | shunya nati kon wale bindu
e: Represents the magnetic equator. / chumbakiya bhumadhya rekha ko darshati hai.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of an ideal inductor with zero resistance?
shunya pratirodh wale adarsh prerak ka sw-prerakatva kya hai?
e: Depends on geometry only. / sirf jyamiti par nirbhar.

q:
What is 'Mutual Inductance' unit?
'anyonya prerakatva' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Same as self inductance. / sw-prerakatva ke saman.

q:
Which part of ear is 'Snail shaped'?
kaan ka kaun sa bhag 'ghonghe ke aakar' ka hai?
e: Revision Point.

q:
What is the speed of light in vacuum related to $\mu_0$?
nirvat mein prakash ki chaal $\mu_0$ se kaise judi hai?
e: Fundamental electromagnetic relation.

q:
What is 'Flux Leakage' in a transformer?
transformer mein 'flux leakage' kya hai?
o: Loss of energy | oorja ki hani
e: Primary flux not linking secondary coil. / prathmik flux ka dwitiyak se na judna.

q:
Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding'?
'chumbakiya parirakshan' ke liye kya upyog hota hai?
e: High permeability alloy. / uchh pargamyata wali mishra dhatu.

q:
What is 'Relative Permeability' of a superconductor?
superconductor ki 'sapeksh pargamyata' kya hoti hai?
e: Meissner effect results in zero permeability. / Meissner prabhav se shunya pargamyata milti hai.

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of force on a moving charge?
gatiman avesh par bal ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Fleming's Left-hand rule | Fleming ka baayein hath ka niyam
e: Thumb = Force, Forefinger = Field. / angutha = bal, tarjani = kshetra.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Induction' at center of circular loop?
vrittakar loop ke kendra par chumbakiya preran kya hai?
e: Strongest field at center. / kendra par sabse mazboot kshetra.

q:
What is the 'Flux' linkage for 100 turns with 0.1 Weber each?
100 phero ka flux linkage kya hoga yadi har phere mein 0.1 Weber hai?

What is 'Barkhausen Effect' evidence of?
'barkhausen effect' kiska praman hai?
e: Shows jerky domain alignment. / jhatkedar domain sanrekhan dikhata hai.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Antimony'?
'antimony' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: It is a diamagnetic substance. / ye ek prati-chumbakiya padarth hai.

q:
Which material is used for 'Permanent Magnets' like Alnico?
alnico jaise sthayi chumbak ke liye kya gun zaruri hai?
e: Ensures it stays magnetic. / chumbaktva banaye rakhna nirdharit karta hai.

q:
What is 'Agonic Line'?
'agonic line' kya hai?
e: Joins places where magnetic north = true north. / un sthanon ko jodti hai jahan chumbakiya uttar = satya uttar.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Flux' unit in SI?
SI mein 'flux' ki ikai kya hai?
e: Standard SI unit.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a long solenoid proportional to?
perinalika ka sw-prerakatva kiske samanupati hai?
e: Square of the number of turns. / phero ke varg ke samanupati.

q:
What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area for steel compared to soft iron?
steel ka hysteresis loop area narm lohe ki tulna mein kaisa hai?
e: Steel has higher energy loss. / steel mein oorja hani zyada hoti hai.

q:
What is the speed of sound in 'Hydrogen'?
'hydrogen' mein dhwani ki chaal kya hai?
e: Revision point.

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field for a solenoid?
perinalika ke liye chumbakiya kshetra ki disha kaun sa niyam deta hai?
o: Right-hand Palm rule | dayein hath ki hatheli ka niyam
e: Thumb = North pole. / angutha = uttar dhruv.

q:
What is 'Tesla' unit for?
'Tesla' kiski ikai hai?
e: SI unit of B.

q:
Which part of ear is 'Pinna'?
kaan ka kaun sa bhag 'pinna' hai?
e: Revision point.

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a straight wire?
seedhe tar ka sw-prerakatva kya hai?
e: Requires a loop for flux linkage. / flux linkage ke liye loop chahiye.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Liquid Oxygen'?
'liquid oxygen' ki chumbakiya pravritti kya hai?
e: It is paramagnetic. / ye anu-chumbakiya hai.

q:
What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?
soft iron ki 'nigrahita' kaisi hoti hai?
e: Easy to demagnetize. / vichumbakit karna aasan hai.

q:
What is the magnetism target completed now?
magnetism mein ab tak kitne prashn poore huye?
e: 900 questions done! Final 100 remaining. / 900 prashn poore! aakhri 100 bache hain.

q:
What is 'Tesla' in terms of Weber?
Weber ke sandarbh mein 'Tesla' kya hai?
e: Flux per unit area.

q:
What is 'Relative Permeability' ($\mu_r$) for a vacuum?
nirvat ki sapeksh pargamyata kya hai?
e: Standard definition.

q:
Which material shows 'Ferrimagnetism'?
kaun sa padarth 'ferrimagnetism' dikhata hai?
e: Unequal opposite moments.

q:
What is 'Magnetic Intensity' (H) independent of?
'chumbakiya teevrata' (H) kisse swatantra hai?
e: H depends on I and n only.

q:
What is 'Hysteresis Loop' area energy loss form?
hysteresis loop area oorja hani ka roop kya hai?
e: Lost as thermal energy. / ushmiya oorja ke roop mein hani.

q:
What is the full form of 'SQUID' in magnetic measurements?
चुंबकीय मापन में 'SQUID' का पूर्ण रूप क्या है?
o: Superconducting Quantum Interference Device | Superconducting Quantum Interference Device
e: SQUIDs are extremely sensitive magnetometers used to measure very weak magnetic fields. / SQUID बहुत कमजोर चुंबकीय क्षेत्रों को मापने के लिए उपयोग किए जाने वाले संवेदनशील मैग्नेटोमीटर हैं।

q:
Which 'Effect' is the working principle of SQUIDs?
SQUIDs के कार्य करने का सिद्धांत किस 'प्रभाव' पर आधारित है?
e: It involves the tunneling of Cooper pairs across a thin insulating barrier between two superconductors. / इसमें दो अतिचालकों के बीच एक पतली बाधा के माध्यम से कूपर जोड़ों का टनलिंग शामिल है।

q:
What is 'Magnetohydrodynamics' (MHD) the study of?
'मैग्नेटोहाइड्रोडायनामिक्स' (MHD) किसका अध्ययन है?
o: Magnetic properties of electrically conducting fluids | विद्युत चालक तरल पदार्थों के चुंबकीय गुण
e: Deals with fluids like plasma, liquid metals, and salt water. / यह प्लाज्मा, तरल धातुओं और खारे पानी जैसे तरल पदार्थों से संबंधित है।

q:
The 'Solar Wind' interacts with Earth's magnetic field to create:
'सौर पवन' पृथ्वी के चुंबकीय क्षेत्र के साथ क्रिया करके क्या बनाती है?
e: The region of space surrounding Earth where its magnetic field dominates. / अंतरिक्ष का वह क्षेत्र जहां पृथ्वी का चुंबकीय क्षेत्र प्रभावी होता है।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Pressure' in a plasma context?
प्लाज्मा के संदर्भ में 'चुंबकीय दबाव' क्या है?
o: Energy density of the magnetic field ($B^2/2\mu_0$) | चुंबकीय क्षेत्र का ऊर्जा घनत्व
e: Forces acting on the plasma due to the magnetic field gradient. / चुंबकीय क्षेत्र प्रवणता के कारण प्लाज्मा पर लगने वाला बल।

q:
What is the 'SI Unit' of Magnetic Susceptibility per unit volume?
प्रति इकाई आयतन चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति की 'SI इकाई' क्या है?
e: Volume susceptibility is a pure ratio. / आयतन प्रवृत्ति एक शुद्ध अनुपात है।

q:
What happens to the 'Critical Field' ($B_c$) of a superconductor as temperature increases?
तापमान बढ़ने पर अतिचालक के 'क्रांतिक क्षेत्र' ($B_c$) का क्या होता है?
e: The critical field required to destroy superconductivity drops to zero at $T_c$. / $T_c$ पर अतिचालकता नष्ट करने के लिए आवश्यक क्षेत्र शून्य हो जाता है।

q:
Which part of ear is responsible for balance and orientation?
कान का कौन सा भाग संतुलन और अभिविन्यास के लिए जिम्मेदार है?
e: Magnetism quiz revision: Part of vestibular system. / रिवीजन: वेस्टिबुलर सिस्टम का हिस्सा।

q:
What is 'Ferrimagnetic' material's net magnetic moment?
'फेरीमैग्नेटिक' पदार्थ का शुद्ध चुंबकीय आघूर्ण क्या होता है?
o: Large and Non-zero | बड़ा और गैर-शून्य
e: Unlike antiferromagnets, the opposing moments do not fully cancel. / एंटीफेरोमैग्नेट्स के विपरीत, इसमें विरोधी आघूर्ण पूरी तरह से समाप्त नहीं होते।

q:
What is 'Curie Temperature' of 'Gadolinium' approx?
'गैडोलीनियम' का 'क्यूरी तापमान' लगभग क्या है?
e: Gadolinium is ferromagnetic only below room temperature. / गैडोलीनियम केवल कमरे के तापमान से नीचे लौह-चुंबकीय होता है।

q:
Which 'Law' is used to determine the path of cosmic rays in Earth's field?
पृथ्वी के क्षेत्र में ब्रह्मांडीय किरणों (Cosmic rays) के पथ को निर्धारित करने के लिए किस 'नियम' का उपयोग होता है?
o: Lorentz Force Law | लोरेंट्ज़ बल नियम
e: $F = q(v 	imes B)$. Deflects charged particles away from the equator. / आवेशित कणों को भूमध्य रेखा से दूर विक्षेपित करता है।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Bottling'?
'मैग्नेटिक बॉटलिंग' क्या है?
o: Confining plasma using magnetic fields | चुंबकीय क्षेत्रों का उपयोग करके प्लाज्मा को रोकना
e: Used in fusion reactors to keep hot plasma away from walls. / फ्यूजन रिएक्टरों में गर्म प्लाज्मा को दीवारों से दूर रखने के लिए उपयोग किया जाता है।

q:
The 'Speed of Sound' in air at 0°C is approx:
0°C पर हवा में 'ध्वनि की चाल' लगभग है:
e: Sound Set Revision Point. / साउंड सेट रिवीजन पॉइंट।

q:
What is the 'Unit' of Magnetomotive Force (mmf)?
चुंबकीय वाहक बल (mmf) की 'इकाई' क्या है?
e: Product of number of turns and current ($N 	imes I$). / फेरों की संख्या और करंट का गुणनफल।

q:
What is the relation between 'Permeability' and 'Susceptibility'?
'पारगम्यता' और 'प्रवृत्ति' के बीच क्या संबंध है?
e: Relative permeability is susceptibility plus one. / सापेक्ष पारगम्यता प्रवृत्ति और एक का योग है।

q:
Which material has 'Highest' susceptibility among common elements?
सामान्य तत्वों में किस पदार्थ की प्रवृत्ति 'उच्चतम' है?
e: Iron has the highest room temperature magnetic susceptibility. / लोहे की कमरे के तापमान पर चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति सबसे अधिक होती है।

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a coil if it induces 10V when current changes at 2 A/s?
यदि करंट 2 A/s की दर से बदलता है और 10V प्रेरित होता है, तो कुंडली का 'स्व-प्रेरकत्व' क्या है?
e: $10 / 2 = 5$ Henry. / गणना सूत्र के अनुसार।

q:
What is 'Mutual Inductance' (M) unit in terms of 'Weber/Ampere'?
'वेबर/एम्पीयर' के संदर्भ में 'अन्योन्य प्रेरकत्व' (M) की इकाई क्या है?
e: Both self and mutual inductance share the unit Henry ($1 H = 1 Wb/A$). / दोनों का मात्रक हेनरी ही होता है।

q:
What is the 'Flux' through a loop if area vector is perpendicular to magnetic field?
यदि क्षेत्रफल सदिश चुंबकीय क्षेत्र के लंबवत है, तो लूप के माध्यम से 'फ्लक्स' क्या है?
e: $\Phi = BA \cos 90^\circ = 0$. / चूंकि cos 90 शून्य होता है।

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of magnetic field around a straight current wire?
सीधे करंट वाले तार के चारों ओर चुंबकीय क्षेत्र की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
o: Right-hand Thumb Rule | दाएं हाथ के अंगूठे का नियम
e: Thumb points to current, fingers indicate field circles. / अंगूठा करंट की ओर, उंगलियां क्षेत्र दर्शाती हैं।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Hysteresis' area representing energy loss as?
हिस्टेरेसिस क्षेत्रफल ऊर्जा हानि को किस रूप में दर्शाता है?
e: Work done against internal domain friction. / आंतरिक डोमेन घर्षण के विरुद्ध किया गया कार्य।

q:
What is 'Aclinic Line'?
'एक्लिनिक रेखा' क्या है?
o: Zero Dip (Magnetic Equator) | शून्य नति (चुंबकीय भूमध्य रेखा)
e: Joins places with zero magnetic dip. / शून्य चुंबकीय झुकाव वाले स्थानों को जोड़ती है।

q:
What is the value of 'Earth's Magnetic Field' at the surface approx?
पृथ्वी की सतह पर 'चुंबकीय क्षेत्र' का अनुमानित मान क्या है?
e: Varies between 0.25 to 0.65 Gauss. / 0.25 से 0.65 गॉस के बीच होता है।

q:
What is 'Tesla' in terms of Gauss?
गॉस के संदर्भ में 'टेस्ला' क्या है?

Which 'Substance' has susceptibility $\chi < 0$?
किस 'पदार्थ' की प्रवृत्ति $\chi < 0$ होती है?
e: Diamagnetic materials like Copper and Water. / तांबा और पानी जैसे प्रति-चुंबकीय पदार्थ।

q:
Which part of ear is the 'Hammer'?
कान का कौन सा भाग 'हैमर' है?
e: Part of ossicles (Malleus). / मध्य कान की हड्डी।

q:
What is 'Step-up Transformer' function?
'स्टेप-अप ट्रांसफार्मर' का कार्य क्या है?
e: Primary turns < Secondary turns. / प्राइमरी फेरे < सेकेंडरी फेरे।

q:
What is 'Step-down Transformer' turns ratio ($N_s/N_p$)?
'स्टेप-डाउन ट्रांसफार्मर' फेरों का अनुपात ($N_s/N_p$) क्या है?
e: Secondary has fewer turns to lower voltage. / वोल्टेज कम करने के लिए कम फेरे।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Susceptibility' of 'Antimony'?
'एंटीमनी' की चुंबकीय प्रवृत्ति क्या है?
e: Antimony is a diamagnetic material. / एंटीमनी एक प्रति-चुंबकीय पदार्थ है।

q:
What is 'Self Inductance' of a straight wire approx?
एक सीधे तार का 'स्व-प्रेरकत्व' लगभग क्या होता है?
e: Inductance requires a loop to capture flux effectively. / प्रभावी रूप से फ्लक्स पकड़ने के लिए लूप की आवश्यकता होती है।

q:
What is 'Flux' linkage for 100 turns if each has 0.2 Wb?
100 फेरों के लिए फ्लक्स लिंकेज क्या होगा यदि प्रत्येक में 0.2 Wb है?
e: Total linkage = $N\Phi$. / कुल लिंकेज $N\Phi$ है।

q:
Which material is used for 'Magnetic Shielding'?
'चुंबकीय परिरक्षण' के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग होता है?
e: High permeability alloy. / उच्च पारगम्यता वाली मिश्र धातु।

q:
What is the speed of EM waves in vacuum approx?
निर्वात में EM तरंगों की चाल लगभग क्या है?
e: Constant for all electromagnetic radiations. / सभी विद्युत चुंबकीय विकिरणों के लिए नियत।

q:
What is 'Mutual Inductance' of two coils if current changes by 5A/s and EMF is 25V?
दो कुंडलियों का अन्योन्य प्रेरकत्व क्या होगा यदि करंट 5A/s से बदलता है और EMF 25V है?
e: $25 / 5 = 5$ Henry. / गणना सूत्र के अनुसार।

q:
Which part of ear is 'Snail shaped'?
कान का कौन सा भाग 'घोंघे के आकार' का है?
e: Contains organ of Corti. / इसमें कॉर्टी का अंग होता है।

q:
What is the unit of 'Permeability' of free space ($\mu_0$)?
मुक्त स्थान की 'पारगम्यता' ($\mu_0$) की इकाई क्या है?
e: Standard magnetic constant unit. / मानक चुंबकीय नियतांक इकाई।

q:
What is 'Tesla' in base SI units?
मूल SI इकाइयों में 'टेस्ला' क्या है?
e: Derived from $F/qv$. / सूत्र $F/qv$ से व्युत्पन्न।

q:
What is the frequency of 'Household AC' in India?
भारत में 'घरेलू AC' की आवृत्ति क्या है?
e: Standard utility frequency. / मानक उपयोगिता आवृत्ति।

q:
Which 'Rule' gives the direction of 'Induced current'?
'प्रेरित धारा' की दिशा कौन सा 'नियम' देता है?
e: Always opposes the change that caused it. / हमेशा उस परिवर्तन का विरोध करता है जो इसे उत्पन्न करता है।

q:
What is 'Barkhausen Effect' evidence of?
'बरखौसेन प्रभाव' किसका प्रमाण है?
e: Discontinuous realignment of domains. / डोमेन का विच्छिन्न पुनर्गठन।

q:
What is 'Magnetic Intensity' (H) independent of?
'चुंबकीय तीव्रता' (H) किससे स्वतंत्र है?
e: Depends only on excitation current and geometry. / केवल उत्तेजना करंट और ज्यामिति पर निर्भर करता है।

q:
What is the magnetism target completed now?
मैग्नेटिज्म में अब तक कुल कितने प्रश्न पूरे हो चुके हैं?
e: Almost reached the 1000 mark! / 1000 के लक्ष्य के करीब!

q:
What is 'Coercivity' of soft iron?
नरम लोहे की 'निग्राहिता' क्या है?
e: Easy to demagnetize. / विचुंबकित करना आसान है।

q:
Which material is used for 'Permanent Magnets' like Alnico?
Alnico जैसे 'स्थायी चुंबक' के लिए किस सामग्री का उपयोग होता है?
